channel.title: fullstackfusions
channel.description: Engineering blog — architecture, databases, and systems thinking by Mihir.

item.title: LLM Fine-Tuning: What Nobody Tells You Until You've Burned the GPU Budget
item.description: A Principal Engineer's honest field guide to LLM fine-tuning — from LoRA and QLoRA mechanics to DPO, dataset curation, and the decision framework for when not to fine-tune.

item.title: Databases: A Lead Engineer's Field Guide to Picking the Right Tool
item.description: From OLTP to analytics, caches to graphs — how I think about database selection as a Lead Software Developer inching toward Principal.

item.title: Subdomains vs Path-Based Routing: The Architecture Decision Nobody Talks About
item.description: One routing choice quietly shapes your security posture, deployment pipeline, and scaling strategy. Here's how banks, hospitals, and big tech think about it — and how you should too.
